retrieval: goal 063 leg B — Australia Register fixture capture (test-designer)
purpose: Fetch the 4 pinned member PDFs (regime doc §7) as raw bytes to ESTABLISH the sha256 Bronze pins the spec leg deferred behind the Azure-WAF (§7/§open-questions, E11/E12), and to serve as the authoritative source for the test-designer's independent expected.*.json.
waf_reality: www.aph.gov.au is fronted by an Azure Front Door WAF that 403-blocks every non-browser client (curl, WebFetch, server-fetch proxies — regime doc E11/E12). The spec leg (063a) could only obtain CONTENT via the r.jina.ai browser reader and deferred the canonical raw-byte pins. This leg obtained the raw bytes via a real browser engine.

method.engine: Playwright Chromium (installed for web e2e) — chromium-1228/chrome-win64/chrome.exe, navigator.userAgent 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/149.0.7827.55 Safari/537.36'. This is the us_senate §2.5 browser-engine fetch seam.
method.steps: (1) navigate the register index (establishes the aph.gov.au same-origin context); (2) for each member PDF, run an in-page fetch(url,{credentials:'include'}) from that page and read response.arrayBuffer() — the request rides the browser's real TLS/UA fingerprint + same-origin cookies, which the WAF admits. Raw response bytes are sha256'd and saved (NOT page.content() DOM re-serialization, fixture-capture skill learning).
method.identification: From: ssm.leo@outlook.com header injected by a Playwright context route SCOPED to www.aph.gov.au only (From is not CORS-safelisted; scoping avoids preflights that would kill CDN JS on third-party hosts). The browser's own UA is kept — a bot UA would trip the WAF — with From carrying the contact.
method.politeness: concurrency 1; sequential; >=3s spacing between PDF fetches; 5 requests total; zero 403s; zero 429s (invariant 10).

provenance_check: each PDF's HTTP Last-Modified matches the archived spec-leg reader-extract 'Published Time' to the exact second (Buchholz Thu 26 Feb 2026 00:08:24 GMT = E6; Chalmers Thu 30 Apr 2026 03:15:11 GMT = E5; Albanese Tue 26 May 2026 22:10:00 GMT = E4; Katter Tue 09 Sep 2025 02:16:33 GMT = E3) — the pinned raw bytes ARE the exact document VERSION the spec-writer read, so the reader-extracts are a faithful second-pass cross-check of these bytes.
second_pass_reads: For the test-designer's authoritative Pass A: pdftotext -layout (poppler) for the clean text-layer docs (Buchholz, Chalmers) and a WinRT Windows.Data.Pdf page render read visually for the scanned-vision docs (Katter, Albanese, whose embedded OCR text layer is garbage but whose typed-then-scanned pages render legibly). Reconciled cell-by-cell with the reader-extracts (Pass B).
outcome: 4/4 raw-byte pins established; all HTTP 200; all %PDF-. The regime doc §7/§8 pin placeholders can now be backfilled from crates/adapters/australia_register/fixtures/MANIFEST.json (deliberately not edited into the methodology page here — founder/methodology-gated).
